description: SpatialConv(8ch,pool4x8) + BiGRU(32,2L) + CE mean-pool, grouped-by-token CV
label smoothing 0.1 — prevents overconfidence, big win on worst folds
separate per-position heads + dropout 0.3 before head — decouples positions
mixup alpha=0.2 — interpolate pairs + soft CE, reduces overfitting
EMA decay=0.998 — slower, exceeded time budget, more variable folds
per-position attention pooling — worse, only 30 timesteps too few for learned queries
R-Drop alpha=0.5 — double forward pass exceeds time budget, KL reg didn't help
k-NN eval on supervised embeddings — best-of(linear, k-NN k=10) per fold
SupCon+CE (wt=0.5,τ=0.1) — hurt both linear and k-NN, contrastive fights CE
center loss (wt=0.1) — destroyed linear head, didn't help k-NN, too aggressive
TTA 8 copies — average logits+embeddings over augmented val copies
CEBRA articulatory head — project to 15-dim articulatory features, cosine classify
dual head (CE+articulatory averaged logits) — ensemble reduces variance
+ focal loss γ=2 — marginal improvement, focuses on hard phonemes
H=64 (298K params) — still overfits despite regularization, H=32 better at N=120
proj head SupCon (wt=0.3,τ=0.2) — contrastive STILL hurts even through separate head
mixup alpha=0.4 — too aggressive, fewer clean examples
weighted k-NN + TTA 16 — BEST RESULT
k=15 TTA=32 — over-smooths
snapshot ensemble
patience 15 — budget
CutMix+dropout 0.5
temporal derivatives+WD 1e-3
stride=5 — budget
soft k-NN — too diffuse
label smoothing 0.15 — 0.1 is optimal
